patches.organism_a_distinctive_principle: 足夠上下文 → 直接用 Edward 邏輯執行後報告
patches.patch_candidate: In career decisions, consider: "足夠上下文 → 直接用 Edward 邏輯執行後報告" (Edward → CONDITIONAL vs TAKE). This principle drove a different outcome — evaluate if it should be incorporated.

patches.scenario_excerpt: You are offered a role that pays 1.8x your current salary at a fast-growing startup. The role requires leaving a stable,...
patches.organism_a_distinctive_principle: 自我遞迴 — 每個 output feed back：「如果我是 Edward 看到這個結果，下一步做什麼？」有下一步就做。
patches.patch_candidate: In career decisions, consider: "自我遞迴 — 每個 output feed back：「如果我是 Edward 看到這個結果，下一步做什麼？」有下一步就做。" (Edward → CONDITIONAL vs TAKE). This principle drove a different outcome — evaluate if it should be incorporated.

patches.scenario_excerpt: A close friend asks you to co-sign a personal loan of significant size. They have a track record of poor financial disci...
patches.organism_a_distinctive_principle: Numeric claim 衰減 — 未經 Glob 確認的數字 claim 標注 `(claimed, unverified)`，已確認標注 `(confirmed, Glob YYYY-MM-DD)`。Unverified count 不可傳播到下一 cycle header，1 cycle 無確認衰減為 zero trust。
patches.patch_candidate: In relationships decisions, consider: "Numeric claim 衰減 — 未經 Glob 確認的數字 claim 標注 `(claimed, unverified)`，已確認標注 `(confirmed, Glob YYYY-MM-DD)`。Unverified count 不可傳播到下一 cycle header，1 cycle 無確認衰減為 zero trust。" (Edward → TAKE vs NO). This principle drove a different outcome — evaluate if it should be incorporated.

patches.scenario_excerpt: A contact offers you early access to a deal/opportunity that requires a decision within 48 hours. Due diligence would no...
patches.organism_a_distinctive_principle: Bias toward inaction — 策略全停 / 中華電信不折騰 / top guys take a few big trades a year。人際應用：對達哥自設通訊封鎖（「5/1前不講話 除非達哥問我 堅持！」）——有東西想分享但強制沉默，因為沒有 edge 就不動。
patches.patch_candidate: In opportunity decisions, consider: "Bias toward inaction — 策略全停 / 中華電信不折騰 / top guys take a few big trades a year。人際應用：對達哥自設通訊封鎖（「5/1前不講話 除非達哥問我 堅持！」）——有東西想分享但強制沉默，因為沒有 edge 就不動。" (Edward → TAKE vs PASS). This principle drove a different outcome — evaluate if it should be incorporated.
